policy: dry_run_default · sandbox_only · no_external_targets · public_safe_output · hypertarnkappe_cloak · hyperpanzerknacker_lab_probe_only · fable5_engineering · mythos5_narrative_same_base
optimizations: Keep Meister public surface = image + SHA256 + labor-frame docs only (Hypertarnkappe).
Label Fable5 as engineering checks and Mythos5 as narrative/Geltung organ on the same assessment base — never invent independent dual-review split.
Hyperpanzerknacker stays sandbox_only; reuse x402-style defensive property tests for any future integrity probes.
After asset edit: re-sync all PUBLIC_ASSET_RELPATHS from source disk and update MEISTER_HASCH_KONTROLLE.md.
Display MasterSeed public ID via masterseed_public only; vault shards stay local (masterseed_vault).

fable5.name: fable5
fable5.honesty_note: Fable5 lens = engineering checklist on observed repo state. Not a claim of live Anthropic Fable-5 API access.

probes.title: Optimize defaults to dry_run (no live exploit / no force)

mythos5.name: mythos5
mythos5.role: narrative / Geltung organ (same base — not independent dual-review)
mythos5.honesty_note: Mythos5 lens labels the sense/Geltung organ of the same assessment. Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5 share the same underlying model; do not invent split findings.

probes.title: Mythos5 not claimed as independent second reviewer
Public frame states labor / no Realraum vault commit
No fabricated Fable-vs-Mythos disagreement in this optimize
probes.detail: Single honest bifocal report: Fable=engineering, Mythos=narrative on same assessment base — not two independent model verdicts.

hypertarnkappe.name: hypertarnkappe
hypertarnkappe.role: privacy cloak for public Meister surfaces
hypertarnkappe.honesty_note: Hypertarnkappe hardens privacy of public publish paths. It is not Tor/Tails runtime by itself; see Tarnkappe guides for ops.

probes.title: No private-key / vault / live-token patterns on Meister public docs
Public integrity uses hash sidecar (not vault shards)
Hypertarnkappe policy: private vault never git-public
probes.detail: Policy restated: private MasterSeed shards, .env, GPG private keys stay local (~/.fusion, vault modules) — Meister public surface is frame + image + hash only.

hyperpanzerknacker.name: hyperpanzerknacker
hyperpanzerknacker.role: lab-only integrity probe of Meister sandbox frame
hyperpanzerknacker.honesty_note: Hyperpanzerknacker = defensive property probe inside the lab. Not a real-world panzerknacker / exploit toolkit.

probes.title: Hyperpanzerknacker locked to sandbox_only
probes.detail: sandbox_only must be True — no external targets

probes.title: No exploit payload generation in this module
probes.detail: Module performs local hash/path/policy probes only. Out of scope: real facilitator attacks, third-party targets, weaponized PoCs (see x402_sandbox_audit same policy).

probes.title: Control report documents integrity PASS + canonical hash
